sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 10:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 10:1
items.html: The phases of the real Guf of Nekudim, which are below the AHP, are the third phase of Nekudim. They are called the “seven lower Sefirot of the Nekudim.” (Inner Light, Item 20)
